metadata.title: The Sky Mods - Canvas Modloader & LibTSM for Sky: Children of the Light
metadata.description: Download Canvas Modloader and LibTSM for Sky: Children of the Light. Mods, hacks and customization without root. 100% free, open source and safe. Compatible with Android.

hero.title: Canvas Modloader for Sky
hero.subtitle: Download Canvas and LibTSM to customize your Sky: Children of the Light experience on Android without root access

mods.title: Download Canvas
mods.subtitle: Everything you need to run mods on Sky: Children of the Light for Android

canvas.name: Canvas Modloader
canvas.description: Sky Modloader. Modular wrapper acting as a bridge for plugins without elevated privileges

libtsm.name: LibTSM
libtsm.description: Android port of That Sky Mod. Unified mod menu for Sky, designed for Canvas

features.title: Why Canvas?
features.subtitle: Lightweight and modular modloader for Sky: Children of the Light

safety.title: No Root
safety.description: Canvas doesn't require elevated privileges or specific programming skills.

easy.title: Modular
easy.description: Load existing plugins or write your own. Completely extensible system.

free.title: 100% Free
free.description: Canvas and LibTSM are completely free and open source.

community.title: Lightweight
community.description: Only ~15 MB of storage. Hooks into Sky at runtime acting as a bridge.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

credits.title: Acknowledgments
credits.description: This site distributes tools created by talented developers. All credit goes to the original creators.
credits.canvas: Lightweight and extensible modloader that allows loading custom plugins in Sky
credits.libtsm: Android port of That Sky Mod, a complete modification library for the game
credits.repoDescription: All files are distributed from XeTrinityz's repository. Special thanks to XeTrinityz for their work on ThatSkyMod.

tutorial.title: How to Install Canvas
tutorial.subtitle: Complete step-by-step guide to install Canvas and start using mods on Sky: Children of the Light

step1.title: Download Canvas APK
step1.description: Download the latest version of Canvas from the main page. The APK file will be saved to your Downloads folder.

step2.title: Enable Unknown Sources
step2.description: Go to Settings → Security → Enable 'Unknown sources' or 'Install unknown apps' for your browser.

step3.title: Install Canvas
step3.description: Open the downloaded APK file and follow the on-screen instructions to install Canvas on your device.

step4.title: Download LibTSM
step4.description: Download LibTSM from the main page. This is the main mod you'll add to Canvas.

step5.title: Open Canvas and Add Mods
step5.description: Open Canvas and tap the 'Add Mod' button (+) to import the LibTSM file you downloaded. Select the mods you want to activate.

step6.title: Launch the Game
step6.description: Tap the 'Live' button in Canvas to open Sky: Children of the Light with the activated mods. Enjoy your customized experience!

q1.question: Is Canvas safe to use?
q1.answer: Canvas is open source and doesn't require root. However, using mods may violate the game's terms of service. Use at your own risk.

q2.question: Can I get banned for using Canvas?
q2.answer: There is a risk of being banned when using any game modification. We recommend using mods responsibly and not abusing them in the game.

q3.question: Does Canvas work on iOS?
q3.answer: No, Canvas is only available for Android. There are no current plans for an iOS version.

q4.question: How do I update Canvas?
q4.answer: Download the latest version from our website and install it over the old version. Your settings and plugins will be preserved.

q5.question: Where can I find more mods?
q5.answer: You can find additional mods in the Discord community and the official GitHub repository. LibTSM includes many built-in features.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer

sections.title: 1. No Official Affiliation
sections.content: The Sky Mods is NOT affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with thatgamecompany, Inc., or any of its subsidiaries or affiliates. Sky: Children of the Light is a registered trademark of thatgamecompany, Inc.

sections.title: 2. Use at Your Own Risk
sections.content: All mods available on this platform are provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. Using mods may result in the suspension or ban of your Sky: Children of the Light account. The Sky Mods is not responsible for any consequences arising from the use of these mods.

sections.title: 3. Terms of Service Violation
sections.content: Using mods may violate the Terms of Service of Sky: Children of the Light. By downloading and using these mods, you acknowledge that you assume all associated risks, including but not limited to account suspension or deletion.

sections.title: 4. No Warranties
sections.content: We do not guarantee that mods will work correctly, be compatible with your device, or not cause technical issues. We are not responsible for any damage to your device, data loss, or corruption of game files.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Content
sections.content: Mods are created by third-party developers. The Sky Mods acts solely as a distribution platform and does not control or guarantee the quality, security, or functionality of published mods.

sections.title: 6. Security Verification
sections.content: While we perform basic security checks, we cannot guarantee 100% that mods are free from malware or malicious code. We recommend using updated antivirus software and caution when downloading files.

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All names, trademarks, logos, and materials related to Sky: Children of the Light are property of thatgamecompany, Inc. The Sky Mods does not claim any rights to these materials.

sections.title: 8. Game Changes
sections.content: Mods may stop working after game updates. We do not guarantee the maintenance or update of mods to be compatible with future game versions.

sections.title: 9. Legal Liability
sections.content: The Sky Mods and its operators assume no legal liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use our service or downloaded mods.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: The Sky Mods does not collect personally identifiable information. Our website primarily functions as a mod distribution platform. We do not permanently store user data, emails, or contact information.

sections.title: 2. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for basic site functionality, such as language preference. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or analytics tools that compromise your privacy.

sections.title: 3. Mod Downloads
sections.content: When you download a mod from our platform, we do not log your IP address or personal information. Download statistics are anonymous and used solely to display mod popularity.

sections.title: 4. Contact Form
sections.content: If you use our contact form, the information provided (name, email, message) is used only to respond to your inquiry and is not stored in permanent databases.

sections.title: 5. Security
sections.content: All mods available on our platform are verified before publication to ensure they do not contain malware or malicious code. However, we recommend keeping your device updated and using antivirus software.

sections.title: 6. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with the corresponding update date.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using The Sky Mods, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our service.

sections.title: 2. Use of Mods
sections.content: The mods provided on this platform are for personal, non-commercial use. We do not guarantee that mods will work perfectly with all versions of Sky: Children of the Light. Using mods may violate the original game's terms of service.

sections.title: 3. User Responsibility
sections.content: You are responsible for your use of downloaded mods. The Sky Mods is not liable for any damage to your account, device, or gaming experience that may result from using the mods.

sections.title: 4. Copyright
sections.content: All mods are subject to the copyright of their respective creators. The Sky Mods acts solely as a distribution platform. Mod authors retain all rights to their work.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Content
sections.content: It is prohibited to upload or distribute mods containing malware, malicious code, illegal content, or content that infringes intellectual property rights.

sections.title: 6. Service Suspension
sections.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to our platform at any time without prior notice, especially in case of violation of these terms.

sections.title: 7. Modifications
sections.content: We may modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect immediately after being posted on this page.

sections.title: 8. Applicable Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws applicable in your jurisdiction. Any disputes will be resolved through arbitration or in competent courts.
